title: callianthe scabrida
intro: Callianthe scabrida, also known as the rough calanthe, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. The health benefits of Callianthe scabrida include its ability to boost the immune system, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Callianthe scabrida is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
